mapper.sql: tt.type_id, tt.type_name, tt.sort_order, tt.status, tt.del_flag, tt.create_by, tt.create_time, tt.update_by, tt.update_time, count(t.tag_id) as tag_count
mapper.select:
select from biz_tag_type tt left join biz_tag t on t.tag_type = tt.type_id and t.del_flag = '0'
tt.del_flag = '0'
and tt.type_name like concat('%', #{tagType.typeName}, '%') and tt.status = #{tagType.status}
group by tt.type_id, tt.type_name, tt.sort_order, tt.status, tt.del_flag, tt.create_by, tt.create_time, tt.update_by, tt.update_time order by tt.sort_order asc, tt.type_id asc

select from biz_tag_type tt left join biz_tag t on t.tag_type = tt.type_id and t.del_flag = '0' where tt.type_id = #{typeId} and tt.del_flag = '0' group by tt.type_id, tt.type_name, tt.sort_order, tt.status, tt.del_flag, tt.create_by, tt.create_time, tt.update_by, tt.update_time

select from biz_tag_type tt left join biz_tag t on t.tag_type = tt.type_id and t.del_flag = '0' where tt.type_name = #{typeName} and tt.del_flag = '0' group by tt.type_id, tt.type_name, tt.sort_order, tt.status, tt.del_flag, tt.create_by, tt.create_time, tt.update_by, tt.update_time limit 1
select count(1) from biz_tag where del_flag = '0' and tag_type = #{typeId}
mapper.insert:
insert into biz_tag_type
type_name, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{typeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
